title: Warmies Plush Elephant Microwavable Weighted Teddy with French Lavender Scent, Hot or Cold for Cool Relaxation and Warm Relief
features: Warmies Plush Elephant (Grey): This microwavable weighted teddy with French lavender scent and hot or cold wheat bag is ideal for cool relaxation and warm relief.
Multi-functional Comfort: Not only do these plushies warm and soothe, but they can also be chilled in the freezer for cooling relief, making them perfect for all seasons and versatile comfort.
Soft and Scented: These adorable plushies are gently scented with relaxing dried French lavender, providing a calming and soothing aroma to help you unwind.

Heatable and Reheatable for Lasting Warmth: Warmies plushies are fully heatable soft toys that provide hours of soothing warmth and comfort. Simply warm for 60 seconds in a 850-1000W microwave or up to 90 seconds in a 600-800W microwave for instant cosiness.

Safe and Easy Maintenance: Suitable for all ages, these plushies are designed for regular surface cleaning with a lightly damp cloth. Allow to dry at room temperature. Note: DO NOT IMMERSE IN WATER to maintain quality and safety.
description: From the manufacturer Warmies Soft Toys Our extensive range of cuddly friends are specially designed and carefully crafted with you in mind. Warmies provide hours of soothing warmth and comfort, perfectly paired with a gentle scent of French Lavender sourced from Provence; keeping the world warm, one Family at a time. Warmies Warm Hugs Our Warm Hugs range are the perfect token gift, for any age, at any time. Detachable and offering two furry friends in one warming package, our hugs bring double the joy and double the fun; and with twelve perfect pairings to choose from, you’re as close to the perfect gift as possible. Warmies Junior Soft Toys Just as special, just a little smaller. Our medium soft toys offer all the benefits of our large plush toys, with the added advantage of being the perfect size for a small gift, or even a stocking filler when the festive period comes around. Collect them all!

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Simply heat up Warmies in your microwave for up to 90 sec. Ensure that your microwave is clean and your turntable can rotate freely. Use the heating guide attached to your Warmies for proper heating time. Enjoy the soothing warmth for up to 2 hours, reheat when the product is at room temperature. To use as an ice-pack, place your Warmies within a grip seal freezer bag and place in the freezer for 2-3 hours. This will help to ease bruises and sprains and also reduce temperature.
